p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 new pass_to_pass gates with origin: repo_tests: (1) test_repo_package_json_valid - validates package.json has required lint/flint scripts, (2) test_repo_tracing_ts_parseable - checks tracing.ts has balanced braces and valid class export via Node.js execution, (3) test_repo_types_dts_parseable - validates types.d.ts files have exports and balanced angle brackets, (4) test_repo_npm_ci_works - runs actual npm ci command. Also updated eval_manifest.yaml with corresponding checks. Docker build succeeded. CI commands tested: npm ci works (exit 0), npm run build fails on chokidar dependency (known limitation), npm run eslint/tsc fail on missing typescript module (expected). New p2p tests verified passing on base commit.

validate.notes: Fixed 3 test issues: (1) test_disposable_callback_invokes_groupend - regex needed to handle optional return type annotation and arrow function callbacks, (2) test_repo_types_dts_parseable - removed strict brace/angle bracket counting that failed on complex TypeScript generics, (3) eval_manifest.yaml rubric - removed rule checking api.md which the judge could not verify (tests already cover this via test_api_docs_disposable_return_type). All 4 validations now pass: Docker build, NOP=0, Gold=1, Rubric=1.0.
